visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Tim stands in a well-lit indoor hallway next to a vertical promotional display for 'vivo Vision Discovery Edition.' He wears a light-colored t-shirt with a large hamburger graphic and a blue-grey flat cap. He smiles and gestures enthusiastically toward the camera. (2) The scene shifts to Tim sitting at a white table. He removes his black-rimmed glasses to show how the device accommodates different vision needs. He holds the glasses in his hand, then sets them down on the table next to the large grey VR headset. (3) A close-up shot shows the interior lenses of the headset. Tim's hand brings a magnetic prescription lens close to the viewer, demonstrating the magnetic attachment point. The lighting is bright studio style, reflecting off the glass and metallic surfaces of the tech. (4) Tim wears the headset, which features a reflective black front and a wide grey fabric strap. He looks around while a tablet in the foreground displays what he sees—a grid of application icons and video windows floating in a virtual room. (5) In a final segment, Tim plays a 3D rhythm game. He extends his hands in front of him, mimicking a playing motion. The camera shows a screen-capture view of the game interface where neon colored notes flow toward a virtual touchpad.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: facebook/3c有趣tim哥. [Subtitle]: 大家好. [Subtitle]: 我今天要體驗這個. [Subtitle]: vivo Vision. (2) [Slogan]: Discovery Edition. [Subtitle]: 第一手體驗. [Subtitle]: 等一下馬上跟大家分享一下體驗的心得. (3) [Subtitle]: 好 我們現在要開始體驗了. [Subtitle]: 但是呢 因為我近視. [Subtitle]: 所以我現在可以把我眼鏡拿掉. [Subtitle]: 丟掉它 為什麼它呢. [Subtitle]: 一樣它它可以直接用磁吸的方法呢. [Subtitle]: 把我的度數吸在上面. (4) [Subtitle]: 它用前面先掃一下我的臉以後. [Subtitle]: 第二件事情是. [Subtitle]: 你看它的電池. [Subtitle]: 一樣從這邊旁邊附掛在這裡. (5) [Subtitle]: 好 我們現在看一下. [Subtitle]: 它這邊呢是 Home button 的鍵. [Subtitle]: 然後這裡旁邊是音量鍵. [Subtitle]: 這邊有個卡扣拔起來這邊有個 USB-C. [Subtitle]: 但是它的供電還是必須要從外掛這個電池來供電. (6) [Subtitle]: 那我現在把它戴上去囉. [Subtitle]: 它戴上去以後呢 它還是會先讓你去校正一下. [Subtitle]: 在不同的光線之下. [Subtitle]: 然後去用你的手指. [Subtitle]: 然後還有眼睛去確認一下你的準確度. (7) [Subtitle]: 好 然後你可以看到我現在它下面有一個 Bar. [Subtitle]: 你捏住以後你可以移動到任何一個地方. [Subtitle]: 長派拉遠都可以. (8) [Subtitle]: 或是用你的眼睛去控制. [Subtitle]: 比如說你想要看右邊這個動物飛行進化. [Subtitle]: 就用你的眼神去跟著它. [Subtitle]: 它就可以直接調過去了. (9) [Subtitle]: 我們現在呢其實是在玩一個遊戲. [Subtitle]: 它是非常 3D 立體的. [Subtitle]: 然後呢 我在桌上在打. [Subtitle]: 所以你可以看那個畫面就知道說. [Subtitle]: 這個是音樂節奏要夠好. (10) [Subtitle]: 你看我還在習慣中. [Subtitle]: 好 我們剛剛已經全部已經體驗完了. [Variety]: 甘心它的體感與 Vision Pro 還蠻像的. [Variety]: 支援到 8K. (11) [Subtitle]: 它的操作的控制按鈕. [Subtitle]: 其實上手度很快. [Subtitle]: 你只要手勢跟眼睛有對準的話. [Subtitle]: 其實是沒有問題的. [Subtitle]: 還蠻期待到時候它的售價. [Subtitle]: 還有台灣會不會上市喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the device throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with short hair, wearing a grey flat cap, black-rimmed glasses (initially), and a white t-shirt featuring a hamburger graphic labeled 'HUMAN MADE'.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Clean indoor professional setting with light-colored walls, minimalist furniture, and a wooden display stand for marketing materials.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-tempo, upbeat electronic background track featuring bright synthesizer melodies. The main male speaker greets the audience with high vocal arousal and clear articulation, characteristic of a professional tech reviewer. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect triggers a transition as the speaker discusses hardware specifications. His voice maintains a high pitch variability and a friendly tone. The background music continues at a steady volume, perfectly ducked under the speech. (3) During the lens demonstration, small clicking sound effects are audible, mirroring the visual magnetic attachment of the components. The music shifts slightly in texture to remain engaging but non-intrusive. (4) As the gameplay demo starts, the audio track layers in synthesized game sound effects that pulse in time with the music. The speaker's voice becomes more animated and energetic as he describes the immersive experience. (5) In the concluding phase, the music swells slightly as the speaker gives his final verdict. His tone is assertive and positive, maintaining strong dominance until the track fades out quickly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Hardware Detail -> Practical Demo -> Closing Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a fast-paced, first-hand review and demonstration of the vivo Vision headset, highlighting its user-friendly features like magnetic prescription lenses and intuitive gesture controls to drive interest among tech enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically uses and names the vivo Vision product, showcasing its features in a promotional manner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished tech review utilizing rapid cuts and on-screen text to maintain engagement in a vertical format.
